register_pull_request.description: register a pull request A if merge is enabled
preconditions: I can only register a pull request A if merge is enabled if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that merge is enabled for A
effects: Once I register a pull request A if merge is enabled, it is the case that A is registered

assign_reviewer.description: assign a pull request A to a reviewer slot B
preconditions: I can only assign a pull request A to a reviewer slot B if it is the case that A is registered and a reviewer slot is available for B and A is eligible for reviewer slot B
I can only assign a pull request A to a reviewer slot B if it is not the case that a reviewer is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign a pull request A to a reviewer slot B, it is the case that A is assigned to reviewer slot B and a reviewer is assigned to A
Once I assign a pull request A to a reviewer slot B, it is not the case anymore that a reviewer slot is available for B

unassign_reviewer.description: unassign a pull request A from a reviewer slot B
preconditions: I can only unassign a pull request A from a reviewer slot B if it is the case that A is assigned to reviewer slot B
I can only unassign a pull request A from a reviewer slot B if it is not the case that the validation for A was successful and it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A passed
effects: Once I unassign a pull request A from a reviewer slot B, it is the case that a reviewer slot is available for B

Once I unassign a pull request A from a reviewer slot B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to reviewer slot B and it is not the case anymore that a reviewer is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that workspace checks have passed for A and it is not the case anymore that attestation has been recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A and it is not the case anymore that remediation has been acknowledged for A and it is not the case anymore that the secondary validation flag is set for A

reserve_workspace.description: reserve a workspace B for a pull request A
preconditions: I can only reserve a workspace B for a pull request A if it is the case that A is registered and a workspace is available for B
effects: Once I reserve a workspace B for a pull request A, it is the case that A is bound to the workspace B
Once I reserve a workspace B for a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that a workspace is available for B

release_workspace.description: release a workspace B from a pull request A
preconditions: I can only release a workspace B from a pull request A if it is the case that A is bound to the workspace B
effects: Once I release a workspace B from a pull request A, it is the case that a workspace is available for B
Once I release a workspace B from a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the workspace B

mark_workspace_checks_passed.description: mark workspace checks as passed for a pull request A in a workspace B
preconditions: I can only mark workspace checks as passed for a pull request A in a workspace B if it is the case that A is registered and a reviewer is assigned to A and A is bound to the workspace B
I can only mark workspace checks as passed for a pull request A in a workspace B if it is not the case that workspace checks have passed for A
effects: Once I mark workspace checks as passed for a pull request A in a workspace B, it is the case that workspace checks have passed for A

human_security_review.description: conduct human security review for a pull request A by a human reviewer B
preconditions: I can only conduct human security review for a pull request A by a human reviewer B if it is the case that A is registered and a reviewer is assigned to A and a human reviewer is available for B
I can only conduct human security review for a pull request A by a human reviewer B if it is not the case that workspace checks have passed for A
effects: Once I conduct human security review for a pull request A by a human reviewer B, it is the case that workspace checks have passed for A and remediation is required for A
Once I conduct human security review for a pull request A by a human reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that a human reviewer is available for B

record_runner_attestation.description: record runner attestation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C
preconditions: I can only record runner attestation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is the case that workspace checks have passed for A and a reviewer is assigned to A and A is bound to the workspace B and an automation runner is available for C
I can only record runner attestation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is not the case that attestation has been recorded for A
effects: Once I record runner attestation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C, it is the case that attestation has been recorded for A
Once I record runner attestation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C, it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A

record_approval_from_channel.description: record approval for a pull request A from an approval channel B
preconditions: I can only record approval for a pull request A from an approval channel B if it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A and A was approved via the channel B
I can only record approval for a pull request A from an approval channel B if it is not the case that attestation has been recorded for A
effects: Once I record approval for a pull request A from an approval channel B, it is the case that attestation has been recorded for A
Once I record approval for a pull request A from an approval channel B, it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A

bind_scanner_profile.description: bind a scanner profile B to a pull request A
preconditions: I can only bind a scanner profile B to a pull request A if it is the case that A is registered and a scanner profile is available for B and A is eligible for scanner profile B
effects: Once I bind a scanner profile B to a pull request A, it is the case that A is bound to the scanner profile B
Once I bind a scanner profile B to a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that a scanner profile is available for B

unbind_scanner_profile.description: unbind a scanner profile B from a pull request A
preconditions: I can only unbind a scanner profile B from a pull request A if it is the case that A is bound to the scanner profile B
effects: Once I unbind a scanner profile B from a pull request A, it is the case that a scanner profile is available for B
Once I unbind a scanner profile B from a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the scanner profile B

bind_ownership_group.description: bind an ownership group B to a pull request A
preconditions: I can only bind an ownership group B to a pull request A if it is the case that A is registered and an ownership group is available for B and A is eligible for ownership group B
effects: Once I bind an ownership group B to a pull request A, it is the case that A is bound to the ownership group B
Once I bind an ownership group B to a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that an ownership group is available for B

unbind_ownership_group.description: unbind an ownership group B from a pull request A
preconditions: I can only unbind an ownership group B from a pull request A if it is the case that A is bound to the ownership group B
effects: Once I unbind an ownership group B from a pull request A, it is the case that an ownership group is available for B
Once I unbind an ownership group B from a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the ownership group B

bind_detection_profile.description: bind a detection profile B to a pull request A
preconditions: I can only bind a detection profile B to a pull request A if it is the case that A is registered and a detection profile is available for B and A is eligible for detection profile B
effects: Once I bind a detection profile B to a pull request A, it is the case that A is bound to the detection profile B
Once I bind a detection profile B to a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that a detection profile is available for B

unbind_detection_profile.description: unbind a detection profile B from a pull request A
preconditions: I can only unbind a detection profile B from a pull request A if it is the case that A is bound to the detection profile B
effects: Once I unbind a detection profile B from a pull request A, it is the case that a detection profile is available for B
Once I unbind a detection profile B from a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the detection profile B

bind_secret_rule.description: bind a secret rule B to a pull request A
preconditions: I can only bind a secret rule B to a pull request A if it is the case that A is registered and a secret rule is available for B and A is eligible for secret rule B
effects: Once I bind a secret rule B to a pull request A, it is the case that A is bound to the secret rule B
Once I bind a secret rule B to a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that a secret rule is available for B

unbind_secret_rule.description: unbind a secret rule B from a pull request A
preconditions: I can only unbind a secret rule B from a pull request A if it is the case that A is bound to the secret rule B
effects: Once I unbind a secret rule B from a pull request A, it is the case that a secret rule is available for B
Once I unbind a secret rule B from a pull request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the secret rule B

record_validation_job_success.description: record success of a validation job B for a pull request A using a scanner profile C and an ownership group D
preconditions: I can only record success of a validation job B for a pull request A using a scanner profile C and an ownership group D if it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A and A is bound to the scanner profile C and A is bound to the ownership group D and a validation job is available for B and A is eligible for validation job B
I can only record success of a validation job B for a pull request A using a scanner profile C and an ownership group D if it is not the case that the validation for A was successful
effects: Once I record success of a validation job B for a pull request A using a scanner profile C and an ownership group D, it is the case that A has been attested by the validation job B and the validation for A was successful
Once I record success of a validation job B for a pull request A using a scanner profile C and an ownership group D, it is not the case anymore that a validation job is available for B

record_complex_validation.description: record complex validation for a pull request A using a validation job B, a detection profile C, and a manual test artifact D
preconditions: I can only record complex validation for a pull request A using a validation job B, a detection profile C, and a manual test artifact D if it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to A and A is bound to the detection profile C and a manual test artifact is available for D and a validation job is available for B and A is eligible for validation job B and A is eligible for manual test artifact D
I can only record complex validation for a pull request A using a validation job B, a detection profile C, and a manual test artifact D if it is not the case that the validation for A was successful
effects: Once I record complex validation for a pull request A using a validation job B, a detection profile C, and a manual test artifact D, it is the case that A has been attested by the validation job B and the validation for A was successful and the secondary validation flag is set for A and remediation is required for A

Once I record complex validation for a pull request A using a validation job B, a detection profile C, and a manual test artifact D, it is not the case anymore that a validation job is available for B and it is not the case anymore that a manual test artifact is available for D

clear_secondary_validation.description: clear secondary validation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C
preconditions: I can only clear secondary validation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C if it is the case that the validation for A was successful and the secondary validation flag is set for A and A is bound to the scanner profile B and A is bound to the ownership group C
effects: Once I clear secondary validation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C, it is not the case anymore that the secondary validation flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A

apply_policy_evaluation.description: apply policy evaluation to a pull request A using a scanner profile B, an ownership group C, and a policy context D
preconditions: I can only apply policy evaluation to a pull request A using a scanner profile B, an ownership group C, and a policy context D if it is the case that attestation has been recorded for A and the validation for A was successful and A is bound to the scanner profile B and A is bound to the ownership group C and A is bound by policy token D

I can only apply policy evaluation to a pull request A using a scanner profile B, an ownership group C, and a policy context D if it is not the case that remediation is required for A and it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A passed
effects: Once I apply policy evaluation to a pull request A using a scanner profile B, an ownership group C, and a policy context D, it is the case that the policy evaluation for A passed

apply_detection_policy_with_escalation.description: apply detection policy with escalation to a pull request A using a detection profile B, a secret rule C, and an escalation context D
preconditions: I can only apply detection policy with escalation to a pull request A using a detection profile B, a secret rule C, and an escalation context D if it is the case that attestation has been recorded for A and the validation for A was successful and A is bound to the detection profile B and A is bound to the secret rule C and A is bound by policy token D

I can only apply detection policy with escalation to a pull request A using a detection profile B, a secret rule C, and an escalation context D if it is not the case that the policy evaluation for A passed
effects: Once I apply detection policy with escalation to a pull request A using a detection profile B, a secret rule C, and an escalation context D, it is the case that the policy evaluation for A passed and remediation is required for A

finalize_remediation.description: finalize remediation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C
preconditions: I can only finalize remediation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C if it is the case that the policy evaluation for A passed and remediation is required for A and A is bound to the scanner profile B and A is bound to the ownership group C
effects: Once I finalize remediation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C, it is the case that remediation has been acknowledged for A

Once I finalize remediation for a pull request A using a scanner profile B and an ownership group C, it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A and it is not the case anymore that attestation has been recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that the secondary validation flag is set for A

record_runner_attestation_from_workspace.description: record runner attestation for a pull request A from a workspace B using an automation runner C
preconditions: I can only record runner attestation for a pull request A from a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is the case that remediation has been acknowledged for A and the policy evaluation for A passed and a reviewer is assigned to A and A is bound to the workspace B and an automation runner is available for C
I can only record runner attestation for a pull request A from a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is not the case that attestation has been recorded for A
effects: Once I record runner attestation for a pull request A from a workspace B using an automation runner C, it is the case that attestation has been recorded for A

mark_approval_requested_from_workspace.description: mark approval requested for a pull request A from a workspace B
preconditions: I can only mark approval requested for a pull request A from a workspace B if it is the case that the policy evaluation for A passed and attestation has been recorded for A and A is bound to the workspace B
I can only mark approval requested for a pull request A from a workspace B if it is not the case that remediation is required for A and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I mark approval requested for a pull request A from a workspace B, it is the case that approval has been requested for A

human_reviewer_approve.description: approve a pull request A by a human reviewer B
preconditions: I can only approve a pull request A by a human reviewer B if it is the case that the policy evaluation for A passed and attestation has been recorded for A and a human reviewer is available for B
I can only approve a pull request A by a human reviewer B if it is not the case that remediation is required for A and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I approve a pull request A by a human reviewer B, it is the case that approval has been requested for A
Once I approve a pull request A by a human reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that a human reviewer is available for B

bind_pr_to_approval_channel.description: bind a pull request A to an approval channel B
preconditions: I can only bind a pull request A to an approval channel B if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and an approval channel is available for B and A is eligible for the approval channel B
effects: Once I bind a pull request A to an approval channel B, it is the case that A is bound to approval channel B
Once I bind a pull request A to an approval channel B, it is not the case anymore that an approval channel is available for B

author_channel_approval.description: approve a pr author A via an approval channel C for a pr source branch B
preconditions: I can only approve a pr author A via an approval channel C for a pr source branch B if it is the case that A is registered and the author of A is trusted and A has been sent to the approval channel C and B is bound to approval channel C
I can only approve a pr author A via an approval channel C for a pr source branch B if it is not the case that A was approved via the channel C
effects: Once I approve a pr author A via an approval channel C for a pr source branch B, it is the case that A was approved via the channel C

request_escalation.description: request escalation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C
preconditions: I can only request escalation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is the case that A is registered and the author of A is trusted and attestation has been recorded for A and approval has been requested for A and A is bound to the workspace B and an automation runner is available for C
I can only request escalation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C if it is not the case that an escalation was requested for A
effects: Once I request escalation for a pull request A in a workspace B using an automation runner C, it is the case that an escalation was requested for A

enable_merge_for_branch.description: enable merge for a pull request A
preconditions: I can only enable merge for a pull request A if it is the case that A is a protected branch and A is registered and a reviewer is assigned to A and the validation for A was successful and the policy evaluation for A passed and approval has been requested for A and attestation has been recorded for A
I can only enable merge for a pull request A if it is not the case that merge is enabled for A
effects: Once I enable merge for a pull request A, it is the case that merge is enabled for A

enable_merge_with_channel.description: enable merge for a pull request A using an approval channel B
preconditions: I can only enable merge for a pull request A using an approval channel B if it is the case that the author of A is trusted and A is registered and a reviewer is assigned to A and the validation for A was successful and the policy evaluation for A passed and approval has been requested for A and attestation has been recorded for A and A was approved via the channel B
I can only enable merge for a pull request A using an approval channel B if it is not the case that merge is enabled for A
effects: Once I enable merge for a pull request A using an approval channel B, it is the case that merge is enabled for A

enable_merge_with_escalation.description: enable merge for a pull request A with escalation
preconditions: I can only enable merge for a pull request A with escalation if it is the case that the author of A is trusted and A is registered and a reviewer is assigned to A and the validation for A was successful and the policy evaluation for A passed and approval has been requested for A and attestation has been recorded for A and an escalation was requested for A
I can only enable merge for a pull request A with escalation if it is not the case that merge is enabled for A
effects: Once I enable merge for a pull request A with escalation, it is the case that merge is enabled for A

action_nl_templates.register_pull_request: register pull request {?pull_request} if merge is enabled
action_nl_templates.assign_reviewer: assign pull request {?pull_request} to reviewer slot {?reviewer_slot}
action_nl_templates.unassign_reviewer: unassign pull request {?pull_request} from reviewer slot {?reviewer_slot}
action_nl_templates.mark_workspace_checks_passed: mark workspace checks as passed for pull request {?pull_request} in workspace {?workspace}
action_nl_templates.human_security_review: conduct human security review for pull request {?pull_request} by human reviewer {?human_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.record_runner_attestation: record runner attestation for pull request {?pull_request} in workspace {?workspace} using automation runner {?automation_runner}
action_nl_templates.record_approval_from_channel: record approval for pull request {?pull_request} from approval channel {?approval_channel}
action_nl_templates.bind_scanner_profile: bind scanner profile {?scanner_profile} to pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.unbind_scanner_profile: unbind scanner profile {?scanner_profile} from pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.bind_ownership_group: bind ownership group {?ownership_group} to pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.unbind_ownership_group: unbind ownership group {?ownership_group} from pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.bind_detection_profile: bind detection profile {?detection_profile} to pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.unbind_detection_profile: unbind detection profile {?detection_profile} from pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.bind_secret_rule: bind secret rule {?secret_rule} to pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.unbind_secret_rule: unbind secret rule {?secret_rule} from pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates.record_validation_job_success: record success of validation job {?validation_job} for pull request {?pull_request} using scanner profile {?scanner_profile} and ownership group {?ownership_group}
action_nl_templates.record_complex_validation: record complex validation for pull request {?pull_request} using validation job {?validation_job}, detection profile {?detection_profile}, and manual test artifact {?manual_test_artifact}
action_nl_templates.clear_secondary_validation: clear secondary validation for pull request {?pull_request} using scanner profile {?scanner_profile} and ownership group {?ownership_group}
action_nl_templates.apply_policy_evaluation: apply policy evaluation to pull request {?pull_request} using scanner profile {?scanner_profile}, ownership group {?ownership_group}, and policy context {?policy_context}
action_nl_templates.apply_detection_policy_with_escalation: apply detection policy with escalation to pull request {?pull_request} using detection profile {?detection_profile}, secret rule {?secret_rule}, and escalation context {?escalation_context}
action_nl_templates.finalize_remediation: finalize remediation for pull request {?pull_request} using scanner profile {?scanner_profile} and ownership group {?ownership_group}

action_nl_templates_indef.register_pull_request: register a pull request {?pull_request} if merge is enabled
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_reviewer: assign a pull request {?pull_request} to a reviewer slot {?reviewer_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_reviewer: unassign a pull request {?pull_request} from a reviewer slot {?reviewer_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_workspace: reserve a workspace {?workspace} for a pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_workspace: release a workspace {?workspace} from a pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_workspace_checks_passed: mark workspace checks as passed for a pull request {?pull_request} in a workspace {?workspace}
action_nl_templates_indef.human_security_review: conduct human security review for a pull request {?pull_request} by a human reviewer {?human_reviewer}

action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_ownership_group: unbind an ownership group {?ownership_group} from a pull request {?pull_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_detection_profile: bind a detection profile {?detection_profile} to a pull request {?pull_request}

action_nl_templates_indef.apply_detection_policy_with_escalation: apply detection policy with escalation to a pull request {?pull_request} using a detection profile {?detection_profile}, a secret rule {?secret_rule}, and an escalation context {?escalation_context}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a pull request or a reviewer slot or a validation job or a ownership group or a scanner profile or a detection profile or a workspace or a human reviewer or a approval channel or a automation runner or a manual test artifact or a secret rule or a policy token is also a object
Everything that is a policy context or a escalation context is also a policy token
Everything that is a pr source branch or a pr author is also a pull request
